'''鈭歵-l-sh-th''' ('''katalshethoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:weatherboard|weatherboard]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-l-sh-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:weatherboard|weatherboard]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歵-l-sh-th
|-
! Lemma
| katalshethoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thitalshethoko|thitalshethoko]] || [[word:jitalshethoko|jitalshethoko]] || [[word:shitalshethoko|shitalshethoko]] || [[word:kitalshethoko|kitalshethoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthutalshethoko|thuthutalshethoko]] || [[word:jujutalshethoko|jujutalshethoko]] || [[word:shushutalshethoko|shushutalshethoko]] || [[word:kukutalshethoko|kukutalshethoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thotalshethoko|thotalshethoko]] || [[word:jotalshethoko|jotalshethoko]] || [[word:shotalshethoko|shotalshethoko]] || [[word:kotalshethoko|kotalshethoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thatalshethoko|thatalshethoko]] || [[word:jatalshethoko|jatalshethoko]] || [[word:shatalshethoko|shatalshethoko]] || [[word:katalshethoko|katalshethoko]]
|}
